title: Figaro - Search, Tagging & Detection
text:
Audio AI
modules for developers.
Audio Intelligence APIs for seamless integration.
Just send audio, we do the rest.
Who we’ve worked with
Modules
Search across a set of music tracks using any reference audio file. No metadata needed.
Useful for building:
‘sonic search’ features for B2B music libraries.
Audio Search
Group music tracks in any library by sonic similarity.
Useful for building:
discovery, recommendation and playlisting features.
Related Tracks
Automatically add genre, vocal and language tags to music.
Useful for building:
audio based content filters, metadata management tooling and metadata verification.
Auto Tagging
Search across a set of music tracks using natural language queries.
Useful for building:
intuitive search features for B2B music libraries and consumer music apps.
Text Search
Identify whether the vocals on a track can be attributed to any of the currently detectable artists.
Useful for building:
artist soundalike and deep-fake detection.
VoiceID
Get in touch,
We’re human.
